title: Agent-Memory Project Config v1
description: Shape-only contract for `.agent-memory.yml` (C1 · runtime-trust). Config-Chain precedence (highest first): CLI flag > ENV > YAML > built-in default. Env-var names stay unchanged — this file is an additional, committable layer, never a replacement for ENV.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped only on breaking changes.

repository.description: Stable repository identifier used by retrieval filters and PR-integration. Overrides REPO_ROOT-derived defaults.

threshold.description: Minimum trust score for retrieval. Maps to MEMORY_TRUST_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT.

threshold_low.description: Lower threshold for low-trust mode. Maps to MEMORY_TRUST_THRESHOLD_LOW.

token_budget.description: Progressive-disclosure token budget. Maps to MEMORY_TOKEN_BUDGET.

profile.description: Named decay preset. Maps to a subset of MEMORY_DECAY_OVERRIDES.

policies.description: C2 policy-engine knobs. Every field is optional; absence means the policy is disabled.

fail_on_contradicted_critical.description: Fail `memory policy check` if any critical-impact entry has unresolved contradictions.

fail_on_invalidated_adr.description: Fail if any architecture_decision entry is invalidated by the diff.

architecture_decision.description: Required trust score for architecture_decision entries.

block_on_poisoned_referenced.description: Fail if the diff references any poisoned entry.
